meta.title: Eluus — Rides with people you trust
meta.description: Eluus is the invite-only private transport app. Rides with people you know, no platform fees.

hero.sub: Private transport with people you already know. No strangers, no platform fees, with total trust.

how.label: That simple
how.title: How Eluus works
how.sub: From invite to arrival, everything designed to be fast, safe, and straightforward.
how.s1text: Access to Eluus is exclusive by invite from someone in your network. No strangers in the system.
how.s2text: Quick sign-up with name and email. In minutes you can already request or offer rides.
how.s3text: Add drivers or passengers from your network using their invite code or scanning their QR Code.
how.s4text: Request or accept rides. Agreed price, integrated chat, and navigation directly on the map.

diff.label: Why Eluus
diff.title: Different from everything you know
diff.sub: We're not a regular transport app. We're a trust network with mobility.
diff.c1text: Only people invited by someone already registered can join. Your network, your choice.
diff.c2text: The fare goes directly to the driver. No percentage withheld, no charge per ride.
diff.c3text: You know how much your driver charges per km and decide before requesting. Full transparency.
diff.c4text: Communicate with the driver directly through the app throughout the ride, no phone number needed.
diff.c5text: Opens directly in Google Maps, Waze or Apple Maps with the destination already filled in.
diff.c6text: Passengers and drivers rate each other after every ride, maintaining network quality.

pass.title: 🧍 For passengers
pass.sub: Mobility with people you already trust.
pass.f1text: Track in real time who is online in your network.
pass.f2text: Smart address search with Google Maps. Save home and work.
pass.f3text: See the total fare calculated by distance before requesting.
pass.f4text: The app alerts you when the driver is 200m from your location.
pass.f5text: View all your rides with fares, dates and drivers.

driv.title: 🚗 For drivers
driv.sub: Earn money transporting people from your network.
driv.f1text: You control how much you charge. No rate imposed by any platform.
driv.f2text: Sound notification and vibration for every new available ride.
driv.f3text: You decide on every ride. No penalty for declining.
driv.f4text: Your location is updated in real time during the ride.
driv.f5text: Refer new users and earn extra credits to accept rides.

test.label: Community
test.title: What our users say
test.sub: Real people, real rides, real trust.
test.t1text: "Finally an app where I know who's picking me up. I use it every day to get to work with my cousin who's a driver. Simple, fast and no price surprises."
test.t2text: "I work as a driver on Eluus on weekends and already have a loyal base of passengers. The best part: I keep 100% of the fare. No platform eating into my income."
test.t3text: "My whole crew uses Eluus to get around after events. It's so much safer knowing the driver is someone you know and trust."

dl.label: Available now
dl.text: Download the app, enter your invite code and start moving with confidence. Available for Android and iOS.
dl.inviteHtml: You need an invite code to create your account. Ask someone from your network.

foot.tagline: Connections that move you. Private transport between people who know each other, with trust and no platform fees.
foot.made: Made with ❤️ for those who value trust.
